questions.text: Does the store have a KOMPASS cart?

branches.text: Does the store put new items on it?
Does the store have an area for storing KOMPASS supplies, data skins, pushers, and reset materials?

questions.text: Where in the store is the cart or designated area located (if there is one)?
Does the store have a KOMPASS Champion or reset captain?

branches.text: Do they keep the KOMPASS cart or area organized?

questions.text: Does the store have cleaning supplies available to use?
Does the store provide garbage/recycling bags?
Does the store supply easy access to step ladders and banana boxes?
Is our team provided with adequate data skins/channel strips to replace broken or dirty ones?
Does the store have a designated staging area for new shelf-stable grocery items?
Does the store have a designated staging area for refrigerated/frozen product?
Does the store have a designated staging area for natural foods items?
Does the store have a designated staging area for HABA?
Does the store have a designated staging area for produce?
Is our team notified if the Vestcom box has been delayed or otherwise unavailable?
Is our team informed if there are materials missing from the Vestcom box?
Are our associates notified if the store has not received all shelf strips and POGs for an upcoming reset?
Where is the Vestcom box typically found at this store?
Where are the price tags typically found at this store?
Is there a regular issue with finding either the box or the tags at this store?
Does the store separate strips and/or tags prior to us performing the resets?
Does the store have a specific way they want overstock or not-in-set items handled?
Does the store ask our team to place backstock on the top stock rack?
Does the store ask us to rotate product and check for out-of-date items?
Does the store ask us to perform the marking down of items pulled from sets?
Does the store ask us to make missing tags?
Does the store ask us to clean fixtures in excess of what would be considered our normal scope of involvement?
How do you enter the store each morning?
Do you show up before the remainder of the team?

branches.text: How does the rest of the team enter the store?

questions.text: Does anyone at the store make it difficult to gain entry?
Do you sign in on the vendor log?
Do you know the name of the store director?
Do you know the name of the price changer?
Do you know the name of the grocery manager?
Do you know the name of the grocery receiver?
Do any of the following departments regularly push back on us performing resets?
Does this store use DSL (Digital Shelf Labels)?

branches.text: Does our team get pushback from the store regarding use of a handheld (Zebra)?

questions.text: Is the store's wifi acceptable for performing your job?
When getting signed out at the end of the day, does someone from the store walk the sets to confirm completion standards prior to signing us out?
Are there any safety issues or consistent issues with anything or anyone at this store?
Are there any comments or concerns you would like us to be aware of at this store?
